hero.name: Minh Tu
hero.description: IT student at STU. A passionate young developer dedicated to building optimized web systems from UI to performance.

about.intro_title: Hi there, I am Tran Minh Tu ✌️
intro_description: As a “newbie” in the tech industry, I firmly believe that exceptional products are driven by relentless curiosity and a continuous learning mindset.

Through academic and hands-on projects, I have developed a strong foundation in building RESTful APIs with ASP.NET Core and crafting responsive user interfaces using ReactJS. What excites me most is turning conceptual ideas into robust, production-ready applications that deliver real value to users.
Over time, I found myself becoming more drawn to:

Building stable, secure, and scalable backend systems.
Optimizing user experience (UI/UX) alongside application performance.
Growing my technical expertise through every project and new challenge.
Additionally, my passion for arts gives me a unique perspective on UI/UX, allowing me to strike a balance between technical implementation and intuitive user experience.
Every project is an opportunity for me to learn, improve, and deploy a better version of myself.

experience.title: Experience
tasks: Technologies: ReactJS, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, REST API, Figma
Built frontend with ReactJS using component-based architecture.
Integrated REST APIs for PDF processing and data upload.
Improved UX and optimized responsive design.

footer.quote: A beautiful flower blooms quickly but only shines for a fleeting moment before fading. Planting a tree, however, is different, it may take years for the first sweet harvest, but it yields fruit consistently every year. Pursuing a career is much the same. Some successes are like those flowers - short-lived. But true glory is like nurturing a tree - demanding years of sacrifice, weathering storms, and immense effort to build roots that run deep, allowing branches to reach high and eventually bear the sweetest fruit.
